summary: Iteration 8 - Complete testing of Unified Intelligence Pipeline. All 19 backend API tests passed. All 5 new frontend pages load correctly with proper UI elements.

integration_issues.flow: Document Generator / Evidence Hash / CCTNS Bridge
integration_issues.issue: Shows 'No case contexts found' for TEST123 user - expected behavior since no case contexts created for this user

Backend: /api/case-context/list - lists case contexts (200 OK)
Backend: /api/case-context/{id} - gets specific case context (200 OK)
Backend: /api/case-context/{id} PUT - updates case context (200 OK)
Backend: /api/case-context/{id}/add-accused - adds accused person (200 OK)
Backend: /api/case-context/{id}/add-witness - adds witness (200 OK)
Backend: /api/case-context/{id}/export-cctns - exports CCTNS JSON (200 OK)
Backend: /api/documents/{id}/charge-sheet - generates charge sheet (200 OK)
Backend: /api/documents/{id}/case-diary - generates case diary (200 OK)
Backend: /api/documents/{id}/remand-report - generates remand report (200 OK)
Backend: /api/evidence/compute-hash - computes SHA-256 hash (200 OK)
Backend: /api/evidence/upload - uploads evidence with hash (200 OK)
Backend: /api/evidence/{id}/list - lists evidence items (200 OK)
Backend: /api/evidence/{id}/verify-hash - verifies hash integrity (200 OK)
Backend: /api/evidence/{id}/verify-hash - detects tampered files (200 OK)
Backend: /api/documents/{id}/bsa-63-certificate - generates BSA 63 certificate (200 OK)
Backend: Error handling - 404 for non-existent context
Backend: Error handling - 401 for unauthorized access
Backend: Error handling - 401 for invalid token

critical_code_review_comments: All new routers (case_context, document_generator, evidence_manager) properly integrated in server.py
SHA-256 hashing implemented correctly using hashlib
JWT authentication properly implemented across all new endpoints
CCTNS export returns properly structured JSON for browser extension consumption
Document templates use proper legal formatting (Sec 193 BNSS, Sec 172 BNSS, BSA 63)
seed_data_creation: Created test case context TEST/2025/001 with accused A1 and witness LW-1 for API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Intelligence Pipeline fully implemented and tested. New modules: Unified Pipeline (4-step workflow), Document Generator (4 doc types), Evidence & Hash (SHA-256), CCTV Search (MOCKED - beta), CCTNS Bridge (JSON export). All backend APIs under /api/case-context, /api/documents, /api/evidence working correctly.

mocked_apis_list: CCTV video analysis in CCTVSearch.js uses mock results - AI video analysis is a beta feature
